x-enumeration-literals.name: Benefit Type Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines the type of benefit applicable for the claim.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Benefit Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Checks that the claimant qualifies for that specific benefit under the policy terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Benefit Limit Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies that the claim amount does not exceed the coverage limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sum Assured / Coverage Amount Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates the entitled payout value according to policy rules or sum assured.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deduction / Adjustment Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applies deductions, offsets, or previous partial payments.
